blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,353 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
